response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Vocal performance of '㋰責任集合体' matches the provided reference lyrics perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was fully utilized for the song segment; manual transcription was used for the initial manga-style dialogue segment, guided by burnt-in text and comic panels. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed dialogue to precise vocal bursts; the song segment required aggressive end-time truncation and instantaneous transitions to keep pace with the rapid-fire lyrics and prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: よく分かんないっす。ボクが言ったのはただの冗談で...
subtitles.english: I'm not sure. I was just joking about that...

subtitles.original: もしかしてボク、無意識のうちに真実をつかんでいたのか！？
subtitles.english: What if I subconsciously knew the truth this whole time!?

subtitles.original: お前天才か！？
subtitles.english: You are a genius!?

subtitles.original: おや、これはいよいよ事件解決... になってしまうのか？
subtitles.english: Oh my, could this possibly mean the case is solved?

subtitles.original: 事件解決しちゃった！
subtitles.english: I solved the case!

subtitles.original: 違う違う、私は凶器じゃないですよ。
subtitles.english: No, no, no. I'm not the murder weapon.

subtitles.original: 異議あり！さっき自白しただろ！
subtitles.english: OBJECTION! You already confessed!

subtitles.original: 私が言いたいのは、この事件にはまた別の古代兵器が関わっているかもしれないということ。
subtitles.english: What I mean is, maybe there was another ancient weapon involved.

subtitles.original: だから布に魔力が残っていたんだ。
subtitles.english: That would explain the magical residue on the cloth.

subtitles.original: なんだそういうことか...
subtitles.english: I guess that makes sense.

subtitles.original: 僕が事件を解決できたと思ったのに...
subtitles.english: But I wanted to solve the case...

subtitles.original: まあ次がんばれよ。
subtitles.english: You will solve the next one.

subtitles.original: でもなあ、現場の近くで変なものを見たっていう報告も届いているんだ。
subtitles.english: But we've also gotten reports of people seeing strange things near the murder scene.

subtitles.original: その魔力の痕跡とやらが超常的な力によるものだっていうなら... 変な幻覚が見えた人がいるのもそいつの影響ってこと？
subtitles.english: If the involvement of something supernatural explains the magical residue, does it also cover those weird visions?

subtitles.original: それはまだ分かりませんが、謎は必ず解いてみせましょう。
subtitles.english: I'm not sure yet, but I'm going to find out.

subtitles.original: じゃあうちの捜査資料を持って行っていいよ。
subtitles.english: Then we will give you our case file to help out.

subtitles.original: 民間人にあげちゃダメっすよ！
subtitles.english: You can't give that to a civilian!

subtitles.original: でもこいつさぁ、なんか天才の匂いしね？
subtitles.english: But she seems like a genius.

subtitles.original: さっきはボクのこと天才って言ったじゃないですかぁ...。
subtitles.english: But that was my thing...

subtitles.original: どんな情報でも助かりますよ。
subtitles.english: Any information you have would be useful.

subtitles.original: ただし！資料が欲しいなら、タダというわけにはいかんな！
subtitles.english: Fiiiine! But if you want our files, then we need something in return.

subtitles.original: これ、また歌う流れですか？
subtitles.english: Could that thing be, perhaps, a song?

subtitles.original:
㋰責任集合体
Lyrics, Music: マサラダ
subtitles.english:
[Song: Responsibility Collection]
[Lyrics, Music: Masalada]

subtitles.original: おれは しらない なにも しらない
subtitles.english: I don't know, I know nothing.

subtitles.original: なにも みてない だれも みてない
subtitles.english: I didn't see anything, nobody did.

subtitles.original: そらを みても みえない よるの
subtitles.english: You can't see the sky at night.

subtitles.original: かけた つきに うさぎ
subtitles.english: There's a rabbit in the waning moon.

subtitles.original: これは なんだ それが なにか？
subtitles.english: What is this? What is that?

subtitles.original: ここは たのし それで よろし
subtitles.english: I'm happy here, that's all.

subtitles.original: はしる にげる にがす そらす
subtitles.english: Running, escaping, letting go, averting eyes.

subtitles.original: 月の 欠けた 場所へ
subtitles.english: Toward the place where the moon is missing.

subtitles.original: あらら あらら あらら あらら
subtitles.english: Oh dear, oh dear, oh dear, oh dear.

subtitles.original: あらら あらら あらら あらら
subtitles.english: Oh dear, oh dear, oh dear, oh dear.

subtitles.original: あらら あらら あらら あらら
subtitles.english: Oh dear, oh dear, oh dear, oh dear.

subtitles.original: 妄想 止め処なく
subtitles.english: Endless delusions.

subtitles.original: 創造 咎めなく
subtitles.english: Creation without reproach.

subtitles.original: 衝動 収まらず
subtitles.english: The impulse can't be quelled.

subtitles.original: なぜか なぜか なぜか なぜかしら？
subtitles.english: Why, why, why, I wonder why?

subtitles.original: 最悪だ！ 公序良俗を剥いで脱いで踊れ！
subtitles.english: It's the worst! Strip off public order and morals and dance!

subtitles.original: いや最低か！ なんでなんでつって なんかなんか高鳴って
subtitles.english: No, it's the lowest! Asking why, why, my heart's pounding for some reason.

subtitles.original: 最悪だ！ どうもこうもしねぇよ勝手にしやがれ！
subtitles.english: It's the worst! I can't do anything about it, so just suit yourself!

subtitles.original: いや最低か！ いやーもうほんと 最悪だ！
subtitles.english: No, it's the lowest! No, really, it's the worst!

subtitles.original: だ！だ！だ！だ！ お、おう…
subtitles.english: ...orst! orst! orst! orst! Oh, uh...

subtitles.original: ねてもさめてもつきまとう
subtitles.english: Haunting me whether I'm awake or asleep.

subtitles.original: みえぬいしきのうらがわに
subtitles.english: On the back side of unseen consciousness...

subtitles.original: おおきくあいたくろいあな
subtitles.english: ...is a large, gaping black hole.

subtitles.original: わかる わかる わかる
subtitles.english: I understand, I understand, I understand.

subtitles.original: 許す 許せん 許す 許せ
subtitles.english: Forgive, unforgivable, forgive, forgive.

subtitles.original: かわいい えへへ むふふ こわい
subtitles.english: Cute, ehehe, mufufu, scary.

subtitles.original: りんご ごりら らくご ごじら
subtitles.english: Apple, Gorilla, Rakugo, Godzilla.

subtitles.original: らくだ だぼら らまだん
subtitles.english: Camel, Boaster, Ramadan.

subtitles.original: わたしたち、ぜったいにみてません！！ いってません！！
subtitles.english: We absolutely didn't see it!! We didn't say it!!

subtitles.original: きいてません！！しったこっちゃありません！！
subtitles.english: We didn't hear it!! It's none of our business!!

subtitles.original: ひかりをいっし！！かげにひとつき！！
subtitles.english: Losing the light!! Stabbing the shadow!!

subtitles.original: ゆるされざるしこうを！！あてはまらないいじょうを！！
subtitles.english: Unforgivable thoughts!! Anomalies that don't fit!!

subtitles.original: つつんでいきていこうじゃありませんか！！
subtitles.english: Why don't we live by wrapping them all up!?

subtitles.original: 行動 名も持たず
subtitles.english: Actions without a name.

subtitles.original: 狂騒 意味もなく
subtitles.english: Frenzy without meaning.

subtitles.original: 永劫 自己満足
subtitles.english: Eternal self-satisfaction.

subtitles.original: だから だから だから だからかな？
subtitles.english: So, so, so, I wonder if that's why?

subtitles.original: 最高だ！ 脳が硬化してんだ ぶっ壊して叫べ！
subtitles.english: It's the best! Your brain is hardening, so break it and scream!

subtitles.original: いや最高か！？ なんでなんでつって 跋扈跋扈跳ねちゃって
subtitles.english: No, is it the best!? Asking why, why, rampant and jumping around.

subtitles.original: 最高だ！ 愚行奇行で結構 勝手に生きたれ！
subtitles.english: It's the best! Folly and eccentricity are fine, just live as you please!

subtitles.original: いや最高か！ いやーもうほんと 最高だ！
subtitles.english: No, is it the best!? No, really, it's the best!

subtitles.original: だ！だ！だ！だ！ イエッサー！!
subtitles.english: ...est! est! est! est! Yes sir!!

subtitles.original: むかしむかしのおもいつき
subtitles.english: A long, long time ago whim.

subtitles.original: むいぎむいみのひとだかり
subtitles.english: A meaningless and pointless crowd.

subtitles.original: むじゃきむてきのうまれつき
subtitles.english: Innocent and invincible from birth.

subtitles.original: それが それが それが
subtitles.english: That is, that is, that is...

subtitles.original: ㋰責任集合体 アンタもワタシも関係ない
subtitles.english: Responsibility Collection. It has nothing to do with you or me.

subtitles.original: ㋰責任集合体 楽しくやってりゃ無問題
subtitles.english: Responsibility Collection. If you're having fun, there's no problem.

subtitles.original: 勝手にやってりゃ問題ナシ
subtitles.english: No problem if you're doing it on your own.

subtitles.original: 俺は 知らない 何も 知らない
subtitles.english: I don't know, I know nothing.

subtitles.original: 何も 見てない 誰も 見てない
subtitles.english: I didn't see anything, nobody did.
